heading: Treatment of effluent from sanitation districts of Los Angeles County through city of Long Beach
label: 390h–12n Treatment of effluent from sanitation districts of Los Angeles County through city of Long Beach

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Water Replenishment District of Southern California, the Orange County Water District in the State of California, and other appropriate authorities, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of water reclamation and reuse projects to treat approximately 10,000 acre-feet per year of effluent from the sanitation districts of Los Angeles County through the city of Long Beach.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project described in subsection (a).
